{

    /// <remarks>Mapping plan:<list type="bullet">
    /// <item><description>X &lt;- X [ctor]</description></item>
    /// <item><description>Y &lt;- Y [ctor]</description></item>

    public partial global::Demo.R Map(global::Demo.S s)
